category_sources: source_facts.description says "Memory Bandwidth Benchmark"; official README says MBW determines copy memory bandwidth available to userspace programs.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is raas/mbw and README describes MBW; source_facts.name is mbw.
docs_sources: Official repository README and included mbw.1 man page are the best official documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/raas/mbw; per instructions repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify memory bandwidth benchmarking and CLI usage examples.
